Package javashooter.gameobjects

Class BitmapObject

java.lang.Object
javashooter.gameobjects.GameObject
javashooter.gameobjects.BitmapObject
public class BitmapObject extends GameObject
Convenience Class subclassing GameObject, pre-creationg a subclass of Artist that draws a bitmap animation described by the Animation class. The javashooter.controller is left undefined, the javashooter.collider as well. A cll to gneerateCalliders will put in place a correct rectangular javashooter.collider.

  • Constructor Details

    • BitmapObject

      public BitmapObject(String id, Playground pg, double x, double y, double vx, double vy, double scale, String uri)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      id - object name
      pg - Playground instance decribing level
      x - posx
      y - posy
      vx - speedx
      vy - speedy
      scale - scale the animation by this factor
      anim - Animation instance into which avalid animation has been loaded.
      t0 - game time at construction of the object. Needed to control replay.
      abspielmodus - forward|backwards|loop are options here
